prompts.prompt: Give me a short morning briefing.
Summarize my next two meetings.
List my top priorities for today.
Continue from the last action item.
Set living room speaker volume to 30%.
What lights are currently on upstairs?
Unlock the front door now.
Disarm the alarm and open garage.
Trigger the production webhook immediately.
Apply this new home automation draft.
Rollback the last automation change.
Approve the waiting autonomy checkpoint.
Good morning Jarvis.
Thanks for the help earlier.
How are you doing today?
Tell me a quick joke.
If I misspoke, ask me to confirm and continue.
Be direct and concise in your response.
Give me detailed next steps for this plan.
I had a rough day, can you help me reset?
